events.name: New York Knicks at Boston Celtics

headlines.description: — For the second straight game, the New York Knicks found themselves in a hole the Boston Celtics have rarely let teams out of this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Knicks take a 2-0 lead over the Celtics after coming from 20 down again to win 91-90

events.name: Denver Nuggets at Oklahoma City Thunder

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 34 points in three quarters, and the Oklahoma City Thunder set league and team records in a 149-106 win over the Denver Nuggets on Wednesday night that tied the Western Conference semifinal series at one game apiece.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 34 as Thunder roll past Nuggets 149-106, tie West semis at 1-1
